notes: The disagreement on 'sāṅkhye buddhir yoge tv imāṁ śṛṇu' has a substantive explanation: it identifies the META function as the agreed-upon read (all three traditions agree the verse is structurally pivotal), then carves out the three commentarial positions on what 'yoge' refers to (Shankara karma-yoga as parallel discipline; Ramanuja yoga as the disposition for acting in the light of self-knowledge, sequential moment; Vishvanatha yoga as bhakti-yoga). The explanation closes by naming what the engineering layer adopts (Shankara's reading) and explicitly notes that the engineering analog does not preserve the Vishishtadvaita or Gaudiya specific structural claims at the same fidelity level. This is substantive and honest about the trade-off.
